meaning: washed overboard 浪击落水(指被浪冲出舷外)
examples: The increased WOB is not good for deviation control.
Dry running WOB-L Piston pumps. Best performance characteristics for high pressures. Mainly used as a compressor.
Application of downhole hydrodynamic propulsors solves the problem of exerting WOB, and are helpful to enhancing penetration rate.
